# Demo Launch Repo

Demo Launch Repo is a small open-source CLI example used to show `oss-launch-lint` output.

## Installation

```bash
npm install
```

## Quickstart

```bash
npm test
```

## Example output

```text
Score: 95/100
```

## Roadmap

- Add more demo checks.

## Contributing

Open an issue or pull request.

## Support

Open an issue with the command you ran.
